name: Disruption Fields
identity: Two controlled magical fields maintained by the Quiet Weave to create a constant hum against the encroaching cold. They serve as a defensive measure and a marker of the settlement's active state, remaining operational even as the community prepares for winter.
notes: Entity confirmed as a permanent magical feature of the Quiet Weave rather than a temporary item.
current_status: Remaining active as a constant hum against the encroaching cold while the Quiet Weave enters winter mode.

function.value: create a constant hum against the encroaching cold
